title: Guaranteed Scheduling For Critical Add-On Pods — Marking pod as critical
text:
To mark a Pod as critical, set priorityClassName for that Pod to
system-cluster-critical
or
system-node-critical
.
system-node-critical
is the highest available priority, even higher than
system-cluster-critical
.
